data.title: Acclinate's 2025 report shows progress in health equity with gains in trust and clinical trial access amid challenges.
data.description: Acclinate, based in Birmingham, Alabama, recently published its 2025 annual NOWINCLUDED impact report, revealing significant advancements in trust, participation, and accessibility to clinical trials within the healthcare sector. The report showcases measurable improvements in these areas despite challenges faced by the industry. This community-focused approach saw a notable increase in trust among participants, higher engagement levels, and improved access to clinical trials. The report signifies the positive impact of Acclinate's strategies, indicating a promising outlook in the healthcare sector.

data.title: Senate to discuss amendments to crypto market bill due to concerns over CFTC imbalance with just one confirmed commissioner.
data.description: Concerns have been raised by lawmakers regarding the balance and effectiveness of the Commodity Futures Trading Commission (CFTC) in the US, as it currently only has one Senate-confirmed commissioner. This situation has highlighted the need for additional appointments to the CFTC, as having just one confirmed commissioner could hinder the agency's ability to effectively carry out its regulatory duties.

data.title: Tether's CEO plans to continue growing their gold reserves, totaling $24B, stored in a Swiss nuclear bunker.
data.description: Tether, a stablecoin issuer, has become one of the largest holders of gold globally. The company stores the valuable metal in a former Swiss nuclear bunker.

data.title: Disposable Flow-Battery Bioreactor market set to reach $1.36 billion by 2025, up from $1.19 billion in 2024 - 14.1% CAGR.
data.description: The market for disposable flow-battery bioreactors is witnessing substantial growth, with projections indicating an increase from $1.19 billion in 2024 to $1.36 billion in 2025, representing a Compound Annual Growth Rate (CAGR) of 14.1%. This growth can be attributed to various factors such as the growing demand for biopharmaceutical production, a transition towards single-use technologies, and more efficient bioprocessing methods.

data.title: Organon sells JADA® System to Laborie Medical Technologies Corp in Jersey City for successful closing.
data.description: A recent announcement from Organon indicates the completion of the sale of its JADA® System to Laborie Medical Technologies Corp. Based in Jersey City, N.J., Organon finalized the transaction successfully. The specific financial details of the sale were not disclosed.

data.title: South Korea's Buy Now Pay Later market expected to hit $1.11 billion by 2026, with 25.2% annual growth rate.
data.description: Dublin - A recent report on South Korea's Buy Now Pay Later (BNPL) market reveals promising investment opportunities. The BNPL payment market in South Korea is projected to experience a notable growth rate of 25.2% annually, with an estimated value of US$1.11 billion by 2026. The market has shown strong growth trends in 2022, indicating a favorable landscape for business and investment. The report, with over 90 key performance indicators (KPIs) covering market size, end-use sectors, market share, product analysis, business models, and demographics, provides comprehensive insights for potential investors.

data.title: Corner Bakery Cafe offers $4 specialty croissant sandwiches and $2 chocolate/classic croissants on Jan. 30 for National Croissant Day.
data.description: In Dallas on January 28, 2026, Corner Bakery Cafe is marking National Croissant Day with a special promotion. On Friday, January 30, customers at participating locations can indulge in $4 specialty croissant sandwiches and $2 chocolate or classic round croissants.

data.title: Sola Salons opening new location in Venice, FL at 450 Venice Bypass, Venice Plaza near T.J. Maxx.
data.description: On January 28, 2026, Sola Salons, a leading salon suites concept for experienced salon professionals, revealed the launch of its latest Florida salon at 450 Venice Bypass in Venice. Situated in Venice Plaza alongside T.J. Maxx, this new location offers convenience and accessibility to customers.

data.title: Hospitality at Work® takes over management of 400,000 sq ft office complex in downtown LA Financial District.
data.description: Hospitality at Work, a prominent property management firm and Lowe subsidiary, has taken over the management of two significant office buildings in downtown Los Angeles Financial District. The buildings encompass over 400,000 square feet of prime commercial space. These properties are the Biltmore Tower, a 25-story high-rise located at 500 South Grand Avenue, and Biltmore Court, an adjacent 11-story building at 520 South Grand Avenue. Both structures boast ample natural light and offer a range of modern amenities for tenants.

data.title: Bridgeport now has access to 24-hour purified ice and drinking water with low cost, thanks to Ice House America.
data.description: A new site in Bridgeport, Connecticut, launched by local business owner Nick Mirabile, is now offering round-the-clock availability of purified ice and drinking water at a reduced cost. The introduction of Ice House America to the area on Jan. 28, 2026, is aimed at providing the community with a convenient and affordable option for these essentials. This initiative marks a significant advancement in ensuring the accessibility of essential supplies, catering to the needs of the local residents.

data.title: Philip Eklem promoted to Partner at RJLF, effective Jan 1, 2026. Specializes in patent litigation in U.S. district courts.
data.description: In Washington on January 28, 2026, Reichman Jorgensen Lehman & Feldberg LLP (RJLF) shared that Philip Eklem has been elevated to Partner starting January 1, 2026. Eklem's expertise lies in handling patent litigation cases in U.S. district courts and the U.S. International Trade Commission. This promotion highlights his contributions and commitment to the field.
